entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop Pennisetum americanum being screened for resistance to downy mildew

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet to resist infection by Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: FIELD SCREENING TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A large-scale field technique based on preplanted infector rows used to screen for resistance

entities.name: DRY WINTER SEASON
entities.description: A specific seasonal condition during which the screening technique remains effective

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: An environmental factor that the field screening technique is independent of

entities.name: SPORANGIAL INOCULUM
entities.description: The infectious material provided by preplanted infector rows
